programme.title: Real Emergency: Episode
programme.desc: Emergency responders face real-life crises, including accidents, medical emergencies, and rescue operations. The show follows paramedics, police, and firefighters as they handle high-pressure situations. Through real footage and firsthand accounts, it reveals the intensity and urgency of emergency services.

programme.title: Paramedics
programme.desc: A suburban shooting has Cam and Al battling to save a young man’s life. Risky and Nicola are super-impressed with a spritely 92-year-old. Nathan and Jodie patch up a dirt bike rider who’s fallen five metres and landed on his bum.

programme.title: Emergency
programme.desc: The Royal Melbourne Hospital is non-stop 24/7. Dr Mark Putland examines a quarry worker’s mangled arm. Dr Jonathan Papson carefully removes a screw from a patient’s thumb after a home DIY mishap.

programme.title: Emergency
programme.desc: Emergency responders face real-life crises, including accidents, medical emergencies, and rescue operations. The show follows paramedics, police, and firefighters as they handle high-pressure situations. Through real footage and firsthand accounts, it reveals the intensity and urgency of emergency services.
